billing_utc_info: Billing is calculated in UTC. To match your meter data with billing, select full-day ranges in UTC time (00:00 – 23:59 UTC). For example, if you're in PT, for the billing of Jan 1, select your time range as Dec 31, 4:00 PM – Jan 1, 3:59 PM PT.
accuracy_warning: Meter module data is accurate only from 22nd August 2025, 00:00 UTC onwards. Data before this time was collected during the beta phase and may be inaccurate.
aggregation_warning: Meter metrics data is aggregated over 1 hour period. Please select time range accordingly.
